Just run Caecus with a wheel that boost strike damage
You dont need Naut but shes the best support for that team
Put Frenzy on Lotan and ult 5 times in one turn and kill everything
Hold Doll dispel for defensive buffs/counter if possible
attack potency boosts base damage, poison and retaliate/counter of all cards, as well as starting tentacle damage for Aequor teams
oh, also it's shared across the whole team
Naut is just icing on the cake, the core is just Lotan+Doll+Tank

Embryo units are quite amazing ngl
DPS and ult battery for your allies

Upgraded embryo from her rouse has 1.5x effect, so it charged 45 and gives 15% crit instead, triggers devour twice. But you have to keep in mind that devour will always eat normal embryo first, so the cards you play have to be planned abit.
